appliedUpdates.description: Added filter test fixture design knowledge to architecture.md — guidance on context-to-change ratios for achieving compression thresholds in filter tests.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that filter auto-registration happens at module load via the ALL_FILTERS array in src/filters/index.ts. New filters must: (1) export a createXFilter() factory function, (2) import and add the instance to ALL_FILTERS. This is a side-effect at import time.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: git-status-filter worker had to fix test/config.test.ts because it assumed filter registry starts empty, but filters auto-register at import. This convention is implicit and not documented in AGENTS.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve contradiction in pi-rtk-worker skill: feature descriptions reference 'per IMPLEMENTATION.md' but the skill says 'Do NOT read IMPLEMENTATION.md'. Since mission-worker-base reads it during bootstrap anyway, clarify that bootstrap-loaded context is fine and the directive only means 'do not separately read IMPLEMENTATION.md for implementation details beyond what the feature description provides'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Flagged independently by git-status-filter and git-diff-filter reviewers. The git-diff worker correctly relied on feature description alone, while git-status worker's bootstrap loaded it. Neither caused issues, but the contradiction is confusing.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed TDD correctly and skill procedure faithfully (from git-log-action-branch review)
rejectedObservations.reason: Positive confirmation, not an actionable observation. No changes needed.
